# Fitbod: Rutinas Personalizadas · Fitness

Generated: Jul 22, 2026, 11:11 AM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 11, 2026 - Jul 3, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Hassan_, May 11, 2026, 1/5: "I encounter a significant bug in the Fitbod calendar. Even if my 4/4 objective is achieved, the bad sessions appear as completed. Targeted exercises and the “max effort” phase also seem bugged. Support has not provided any real solution for several days. I was only asked to uninstall/reinstall the app, which is frustrating for a paid app. I'm paying for a reliable app, not for having to fix bugs myself."
            2. _Lord Mute_, Jul 3, 2026, 2/5: "App is glitchy whenever you have a music engine like Spotify play in the background. Consistently has shown to have malfunctioning timers that quit after locking your phone. Record keeping is frustrating to correct and update suggested weights for workouts. Overall, this app is not worth the subscription rate it charges. It is mediocre at best and discouraging at worst."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      6 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jun 20, 2026 - Jul 16, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Alexander Christea_, Jul 7, 2026, 3/5: "there should be a 1.99 usd/month option too with limited ads, it is way too expensive"
            2. _Sarah Roberson_, Jul 6, 2026, 3/5: "Looks like it woulda been great. Took the time to fill everything out then couldn't proceed without accepting a free 7 day trial. Meaning I'll have to pay later. Wish that transparency was up front so I didn't waste my time filling everything out. I don't like having to give my information, then surprise... can't have it without paying. Feels untrustworthy to give money. Knowing up front - I know what I'm getting into."
            3. _Anthony Hough_, Jul 16, 2026, 4/5: "great app for tracking progress and developing training plans. however its quite expensive in comparison to similar apps"
